name: spec-coding
description: Spec-first workflows for requirements-first features, design-first features, and bugfixes.

interface.shortDescription: Route complex coding work through approved specs.
interface.longDescription: Spec Coding adds lightweight spec-first workflows for requirements-first feature work, design-first technical planning, and evidence-driven bugfixes before implementation.
defaultPrompt: Create a spec before implementing this feature.
Plan this design-first change before coding.
Write a bugfix spec for this regression.
